overview.description: The ProShares Short QQQ (PSQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ 100 index. The fund provides inverse exposure to a modified market-cap-weighted index of 100 of the largest non-financial firms listed on NASDAQ. PSQ was launched on Jun 19, 2006 and is issued by ProShares.
